heading: Search warrant procured maliciously
label: 2235 Search warrant procured maliciously
text: Whoever maliciously and without probable cause procures a search warrant to be issued and executed, shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than one year, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 630 (, title XI, § 20, ).June 15, 1917, ch. 3040 Stat. 230Minor changes were made in phraseology.
Amendments2002— inserted “, or both” after “year”.Pub. L. 107–2731996— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $1,000”.Pub. L. 104–294
